g.text: 1. When a new Sales Order is created it should be created in Draft status.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Customer : Name of Customer (store field) many2one (mandatory)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Customer Address : Char Field max limit

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Creation Date: Auto populate date/time when a record is created.(here when a So is created using new button) make readonly once created.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. Sales Person: Dropdown field, with selection of users from database

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6. Products : Dropdown Selction field to select products from Product database. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 7. Sales Price : Populate values from Product (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 8. Total : Ordered Qunatity* Sales Price (once delivered it should be delivered quantuity * Sales Price) (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 9. Availabilty: If Ordered Quantity is greater then Free to use quantity on product. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Back button: takes back to list view

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Confirm Button: changes Status from Draft to Confirm )(when confirm field like creation dtae, customer and customer address are readonly) (hide once status is change) (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Deliver Button: 1. Change status to Fully Delivered if Delivered Quantity= Ordered Quantity (make all fields readonly and hide deliver button) (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Change status to Partially Delivered if Delivered Quantity< Ordered Quantity (make all fields readonly , expect delivered quantity field. and show deliver button)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Cancel Button: Cancel Sale Order and make all fields readonly. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. When a new Purchase Order is created it should be created in Draft status.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Vendor : Name of Vendor (store field) many2one (mandatory)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Vendor Address : Char Field max limit

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Creation Date: Auto populate date/time when a record is created.(here when a PO is created using new button)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. Responsible Person: Dropdown field, with selection of users from database

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6. Products : Dropdown Selction field to select products from Product database. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 7. Cost Price : Populate values from Product (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 8. Total : Ordered Qunatity* Cost Price (once recieved it should be recieved quantuity * Cost Price) (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Back button: takes back to list view

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Confirm Button: changes Status from Draft to Confirm )(when confirm field like creation date, Vendor and Vendor address are readonly) (hide once status is change) (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Recieve Button: 1. Change status to Fully Recieved, if Recieved Quantity= Ordered Quantity (make all fields readonly and hide Recieve button) (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Change status to Partially Recieved if Recieved Quantity< Ordered Quantity (make all fields readonly , expect recieved quantity field. and show recieve button)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Cancel Button: Cancel Purchase Order and make all fields readonly. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. When a new Manufacturing Order is created it should be created in Draft status.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Finished Product : Dropdown selection field, allow to selct products form product Database (store field) many2one (mandatory) (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Quantity : Quantity to be Produced of Finished Good (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. Assignee: Dropdown field, with selection of users from database

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6. Bill of Materials : Dropdown Selction field to select Bill of Materials from Bill of Materials database.(if Finished Product is enter first , only bill of materials for that product only) (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Components: Populate values from Bill of Materials if added , if not added allow to products from product database. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: To Consume quantity: Populate based on Bill of Materials values (numeric field) (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Consumed Quantity : Allow to enter value mannually (numeric field). Show once Manufacturing is in Confirmed state. Make it readonly when MO is in Done/Cancelled Status.(track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Avaliability: Show Avaialble , if there is Free to use quantity = to consume quantity from product., No not show Not Available.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Operation: Popluate from Bill of Materials , If none allow user to add a line, when MO is in Draft, Confirmed or In-progress status.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Work Center: Populate from Bill of Materials, (Mandatory field while adding an operation) readonly when MO is in Done/Cancelled status.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Expected Duration: Populate based on Bill Materials, if none, then its should be time field in minutes, Expected duration should change based on change in MO quantity , (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: For example, if expected duration in Bill of materials for qty=1 is 10 mins, and MO is of 10 qty, the expected duration in MO should be 100 mins.(read-only when MO is in Done/Cancelled Status).

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Real Duration: Time Field, and allow user to enter when Mo is in Confirmed /Inprogress status. For Draft status =Hide, Readonly when Status= Done/Cancelled. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Back button: takes back to list view

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Confirm Button: changes Status from Draft to Confirm )(when confirm field like creation date, Finished Product and Bill of Materials are readonly) (hide once status is change) (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Produce Button: When Clicked, Mark MO as Done status, MAke all field on MO readonly. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Cancel Button: Cancel Manufacturing Order and make all fields readonly. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. Product : Char field, create Product based on it. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Sales Price: Monetary Field, should be poopulated on sales order, if this product is added on Sales Order. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Cost Price : Monetary Field, Should be populated on Purchase Order, if this product is added on Purchase Order (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. On Hand Qty: Numeric field with decimal values allowed. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: a)Should increase by quantity on purchase order, when a product is recieved.(based on recieved quantity) ( PO= status Done)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: b) Should increase by quantity on Manufacturing , if added as finished good and its manufactured. (based on produced quantity) (MO = Status done)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: c) Should decrease by Consumed quantity on Manufacturing Order of Components, if the product is added as component. (MO= status Done)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: d) Should decrease by delievered quantity on sales order, when this product is delivered on sales order.(SO= satuts fully delievered)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. Free to Use Qty : On Hand qty- Reserved Quantity Reserved Quantity is only considered when Orders are in Confirmed or Inprogress state (Readonly field for everyone, only compute value)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Calculation for reserved quantity: a) If the product is added on Sales Order and Status of Sales Order is not yet fully delievered , the reserved quantity is Delievered quantity.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: b) If the product is added on Manufacturing Order Component and MO is not yet in Done status, the Consume quantity = Reserved Quantity.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 6. Procure on Demand: Add a Checkbox when checked, added a mandatory field with dropdown (Purchase and Manufacturing). (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: When checked add a field based on selcteion, If Purchase is selected added field "Vendor", If Manufacturing is Selecxted add a Field "BoM" (mandatory fields)(track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Vendor: Selection from Vendor Name records , Bill of Materials : Selction form Bill of Materials records. (track logs)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: When Procure on Demand is Checked : If On Hand Qty is less then Sales Order Qty, Trigger a Procurement(i.e Create a new A pruchase order is Purchase is selected and for the vendor as specified for the remaining

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: difference quantity, or create a new Manufacturing Order if Manufacturing is selected and for the bill of materials specified for the difference quantity).

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: When unchecked, no purchase or manufacturing order should be created.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Should populated all these fields of Bill of Materials into Manufacturing order when BoM is selected oin it
